description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest Docker image with a docker:dind service, sets CONTAINER_IMAGE to registry.gitlab.com/$CI_PROJECT_PATH and DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay2, and runs a before_script that logs in to registry.gitlab.com with the CI_JOB_TOKEN and installs make via apk. Define a single build stage containing a build job that executes "make build NAME=$CONTAINER_IMAGE" followed by "docker push $CONTAINER_IMAGE". The build job runs in the build stage.
